saved_answer:
The final project budget will be completed after the Swiss implementation partner, any research institution or waiver route, work-package split and eligible costs are confirmed. R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd will only enter costs that are evidenced for the Aureon Evidence OS work package: evidence architecture, source register setup, claim-to-source mapping, reproducible workflow templates, risk and assumption control, partner review materials and funder-ready reporting outputs.

Value for money will come from a lean UK software assurance work package that reuses existing Aureon code, local evidence workflows, open-source tooling and founder technical labour rather than creating unnecessary capital, equipment or subcontract costs. Each cost line will be mapped to a deliverable and milestone so reviewers can see what public funding buys and how it reduces reporting, assurance and delivery risk for the consortium.

No partner costs, travel, materials, equipment, subcontracting, overheads or grant totals will be represented until the partner budget and eligible-cost evidence are complete.
